# Chemical Codes — Full Context

> Specializing in learning from chemical and biological data through advanced bioinformatics, chemometrics, machine learning, and research.

Chemical Codes (chemical codes d.o.o.) is a Croatian company that combines bioinformatics, chemometrics, machine learning, and innovative research approaches to transform complex biological and chemical datasets into actionable knowledge. The company has 4+ years of research experience across 3 core disciplines and runs 2 active educational programs.

## Core Expertise

### Bioinformatics
Advanced statistical methods for extracting meaningful information from complex bio/chemical datasets and analytical measurements. This includes processing and analyzing large-scale biological data, genomics, proteomics, and metabolomics data analysis.

### Machine Learning
State-of-the-art machine learning algorithms tailored for chemical data analysis, predictive modeling, and pattern recognition. Applications include molecular property prediction, compound classification, spectral analysis, and data-driven discovery in chemistry and biology.

### Research
Cutting-edge research in data-driven chemistry, developing innovative approaches to understanding and predicting chemical behavior. The research bridges computational methods with experimental science to advance understanding of chemical and biological systems.

## Educational Programs

### AI in Biosciences — Lifelong Learning Program

A specialized program organized by PTF Osijek and chemical codes d.o.o., designed to train participants in Python programming, task automation, and the application of deep learning algorithms.

**What participants learn:**
- Python programming fundamentals and advanced techniques
- Data processing with NumPy and pandas
- Deep learning with PyTorch
- Creating custom scripts for biomedical data processing
- Applying deep learning to chemical and biological problems
- Independent processing and analysis of biomedical data

**Program pages:**
- Overview: https://www.chemical.codes/lifelong
- Full curriculum: https://www.chemical.codes/lifelong/program
- Lecturers and instructors: https://www.chemical.codes/lifelong/lecturers
- Venue information: https://www.chemical.codes/lifelong/venue

### Biostatistics in R — Workshop

A hands-on workshop covering statistical analysis and data visualization in R, designed for bioscience professionals who want to apply statistical methods to their research data.

- Workshop details: https://www.chemical.codes/rstats

## Site Structure

- `/` — Homepage with company overview, expertise, and contact
- `/lifelong` — AI in Biosciences lifelong learning program overview
- `/lifelong/program` — Detailed curriculum and program schedule
- `/lifelong/lecturers` — Information about program lecturers
- `/lifelong/venue` — Venue details for the program
- `/rstats` — Biostatistics in R workshop details
